statusMeanings.FAIL: check failed or required release state is unsafe
statusMeanings.SKIP: available local check was not run in this dashboard invocation
statusMeanings.SIMULATED: synthetic or dry-run proof exists, but it is not production proof
statusMeanings.MACHINE_REQUIRED: non-interactive machine-attested proof is required outside this dashboard
statusMeanings.MANUAL: gated smoke or operator step requiring explicit context
statusMeanings.INFO: release context or non-runtime safety note

statements: SIMULATED evidence is not production proof.
Dashboard PASS alone is not sufficient release evidence.
Skipped dashboard checks must remain visible and cannot be treated as PASS.
Machine-attested proof commands are non-interactive and fail closed when runtime inputs are missing.
This report does not claim production-at-scale readiness.

openBlockers.label: Disaster recovery / restore
reasons: status must be pass for certifying machine evidence.
failures must be empty for certifying evidence.
missingRuntimeInputs must be empty for certifying evidence.

machine proof is missing a complete accepted check set (default: latest-backup-selected, isolated-restore-target-created, rpo-measured, rto-measured, post-restore-auth-session-check, post-restore-packet-pdf-retrieval-check, post-restore-response-queue-check, cleanup-lifecycle-check, rollback-stop-verification, isolated-restore-target-destroyed).
latest configured backup evidence is missing or not machine-selected.
isolated restore target evidence is missing or unsafe.
safe synthetic restore fixture evidence is missing.
measured RPO is required and must pass.
measured RTO is required and must pass.
post-restore packet PDF retrieval proof is required.
post-restore response queue state proof is required.
isolated restore target cleanup proof is required.

openBlockers.label: Production ingest worker runtime
reasons: status must be pass for certifying machine evidence.
failures must be empty for certifying evidence.
missingRuntimeInputs must be empty for certifying evidence.

machine proof is missing a complete accepted check set (default: queue-depth-before-captured, worker-liveness-verified, bounded-max-jobs-enforced, synthetic-or-canary-job-processed, queue-depth-after-captured, processed-count-captured, failed-dead-letter-stale-counts-captured, worker-stop-rollback-verified, canary-cleanup-verified).
queue depth before proof is required.
queue depth after proof is required.
bounded max jobs proof is required.
synthetic/canary ingest job processing proof is required.
processed, failed, dead-letter, and stale counts are required.
failed, dead-letter, and stale count proof is required.

openBlockers.label: Alerting and observability
reasons: status must be pass for certifying machine evidence.
failures must be empty for certifying evidence.
missingRuntimeInputs must be empty for certifying evidence.

machine proof is missing a complete accepted check set (live-alert-delivery: synthetic-alert-triggered, alert-delivery-verified, sanitized-channel-id-recorded, correlation-id-recorded, machine-acknowledgment-verified, retry-or-failure-behavior-recorded, response-ops-readiness-verified, scheduler-status-verified, no-webhook-or-token-printed | certifying-formal-exclusion: formal-exclusion-file-validated, policy-allows-certifying-exclusion, compensating-controls-validated, response-ops-readiness-verified, scheduler-status-verified, repo-policy-approval-machine-verified, exclusion-not-stale, next-review-recorded, exclusion-does-not-overclaim-production-pass, no-webhook-or-token-printed).

openBlockers.label: Retention archive/restore
reasons: status must be pass for certifying machine evidence.
failures must be empty for certifying evidence.
missingRuntimeInputs must be empty for certifying evidence.

machine proof is missing a complete accepted check set (default: safe-archive-candidate-selected, archive-created-or-selected, archive-metadata-verified, isolated-restore-target-created, archive-restore-integrity-verified, no-pii-exposed, lifecycle-cleanup-verified, rollback-recovery-notes-recorded, isolated-restore-target-destroyed).
safe retention archive candidate evidence is missing or unsafe.
archive selection or creation evidence is missing.
archive metadata verification proof is required.
isolated retention restore target evidence is missing or unsafe.
archive restore integrity verification proof is required.
retention proof must verify no PII was exposed.
isolated retention restore target destruction proof is required.

openBlockers.label: Production promotion pack guard
reasons: Promotion pack certifying flag is not true.
Promotion certification checks are not certifying.
Latest machine proof summary is not certifying.
Promotion pack does not allow production-at-scale promotion.
Promotion pack has 3 open P0/P1 production blocker(s).
Promotion pack audit commit reference is stale.

blockers.title: Disaster recovery
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Non-interactive sanitized restore machine proof with isolated target, RPO/RTO, post-restore checks, cleanup, and rollback verification.
forbiddenProofTypes: simulated restore proof represented as completed disaster recovery
template-only validation represented as completed restore evidence
real PII or raw credit reports
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Provide CRP_RESTORE_MACHINE_ATTESTATION_JSON from a safe isolated restore target and rerun restore:machine-proof.

blockers.title: Production ingest runtime
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Non-interactive sanitized production worker runtime machine proof with bounded queue processing, queue depth before/after, liveness, counts, cleanup, and stop/rollback verification.
forbiddenProofTypes: production queue mutation without explicit production apply guards
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Provide CRP_PRODUCTION_WORKER_MACHINE_ATTESTATION_JSON from a bounded safe canary/runtime proof and rerun production-worker:machine-proof.

blockers.title: Load/concurrency proof
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Accepted release-blocking measured local or staging-safe load evidence with synthetic fixtures, throughput, latency, queue depth, packet PDF cache, DB pool, rate limiter, dashboard references, and zero provider calls.
forbiddenProofTypes: SIMULATED load represented as production proof
measured evidence with failed or warning-only release thresholds represented as closure
measured evidence against a production host
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Run the bounded measured local or staging-safe baseline with synthetic fixtures and release-blocking thresholds; keep production load forbidden.

blockers.title: Packet PDF scaling
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Automated proof that packet PDF cache misses are bounded by a synchronous envelope with duplicate collapse, timeout, overload failure evidence, send-route provider-free failure, cache hit behavior, invalidation behavior, and non-owner denial.
allowedProofCommands: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/unit/packet-pdf-cache.spec.ts
forbiddenProofTypes: SIMULATED cache-miss proof represented as production-at-scale proof
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Keep the bounded synchronous envelope evidence current; collect staged target-environment capacity evidence before making any production-at-scale claim.

blockers.title: Ingest cleanup/data safety
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Automated proof that default failed-ingest cleanup is non-destructive, marks remediation-required state, preserves artifacts/tradelines/evidence, and keeps any retained destructive path explicitly confirmed and production-refusing.
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Keep the retained destructive helper classified as guarded residual risk: it is not default, requires explicit confirmation, records lifecycle evidence, and refuses production-like environments.

blockers.title: Historical raw report bytes
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Non-interactive sanitized raw report byte remediation machine proof with reliable DB connectivity, sanitized inventory, remediation policy verification, and no raw bytes or PII.
forbiddenProofTypes: raw base64, raw report text, PII, secrets, signed URLs, or database URLs in evidence
dry-run plan represented as completed remediation
non-machine acceptance without reliable DB inventory, compatibility checks, and post-remediation counts
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Provide reliable sanitized DB inventory and remediation attestation JSON inputs, then rerun the raw report machine proof commands.

blockers.title: Bureau communication storage
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Automated storage adapter proof for new bureau attachments plus compatibility proof for old inline records.
forbiddenProofTypes: raw attachment bytes in DB evidence
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Keep list endpoints metadata-only and handle any legacy inline rows through an approved historical remediation plan.

blockers.title: Response operations maturity
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Machine-readable evidence for disabled live scheduler, backfill readiness, purge/archive readiness, dashboard/soak references, automated fallback controls, and unresolved alerting risk without enabling live operations.
allowedProofCommands: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/unit/alerts-dry-run.spec.ts
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Keep live scheduler default-off and use response ops readiness evidence to govern scheduler, backfill, purge/archive, dashboard, soak, and automated fallback controls without mutating production.

blockers.title: Observability/alerting
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Non-interactive sanitized alerting machine proof with live synthetic delivery or an explicitly certifying formal exclusion allowed by repo policy.
allowedProofCommands: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/unit/alerts-dry-run.spec.ts
forbiddenProofTypes: SIMULATED alert proof represented as live alert delivery
formal exclusion without machine-verifiable policy acceptance
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Provide CRP_ALERTING_MACHINE_ATTESTATION_JSON for live delivery or an approved certifying exclusion and rerun alerts:machine-proof.

blockers.title: Migration governance
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Non-interactive migration governance machine proof showing no active temporary allowlist residuals, no expired allowlist, exact residual classifications, and no release-blocking findings.
allowedProofCommands: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/unit/migration-checker.spec.ts
pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/unit/migration-gate.spec.ts
forbiddenProofTypes: policy closure while temporary runtime ensure allowlist entries remain active
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Run migrations:machine-proof and migrations:machine-proof:validate; temporary allowlist residuals cannot certify.

blockers.title: Production deployment parity
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Workflow unit tests, current read-only production-safe probe evidence, rollback SHA and post-rollback health-check evidence, local/staging synthetic owner-denial evidence, and default-off production worker path evidence. Static proof is not runtime production proof.
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Keep production probes read-only, keep seeded privacy smokes local/staging-only, and keep rollback evidence tied to rollback_sha plus post-rollback health checks before calling deployment parity complete.

blockers.title: OCR route-local validation shape
blockers.proofTypeRequired: OCR shared upload-validation proof plus valid-fixture output-stability evidence.
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Keep OCR validation aligned with shared upload boundaries and preserve valid PDF extraction output in regression tests.

blockers.title: Parser-test list sensitive field
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Metadata-only parser-test list proof plus admin-only raw text detail/export proof.
forbiddenProofTypes: raw extracted text in list evidence
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Keep parser-test list metadata-only; use admin-only get/export paths for raw extracted text workflows and keep UI detail hydration covered by tests.

blockers.title: Consumer signature list sensitive field
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Metadata-only consumer-signature list proof plus owner/admin get-by-id signature data proof.
allowedProofCommands: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/api/high-growth-list-limits.spec.ts
forbiddenProofTypes: signature image data in list evidence
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Keep signature list metadata-only; use owner/admin get-by-id detail when signature image data is required.

blockers.title: Hidden-risk list semantics
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Design/evidence artifact for hidden-risk aggregate and stale-suppression semantics; full bounded pagination remains a separate UI/query task.
allowedProofCommands: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/api/high-growth-list-limits.spec.ts
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Split hidden-risk aggregate counts from paginated rows in a separate design task; do not apply a blind limit that changes aggregate semantics.

blockers.title: DB pool pressure evidence
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Accepted release-blocking measured local or staging-safe evidence must record DB pool configured max, observed active/borrowed signal or explicit unavailable reason, latency, queue depth, dashboard references, and zero production DB targeting.
allowedProofCommands: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/unit/runtime-tuning-config.spec.ts
forbiddenProofTypes: SIMULATED DB pool signal represented as production proof
measured evidence with failed or warning-only release thresholds represented as closure
production database target in measured evidence
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Run bounded measured local or staging-safe load and record sanitized DB pool configured/observed signals or an explicit unavailable reason.

blockers.title: Rate limiter write pressure
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Accepted release-blocking measured local or staging-safe evidence must record bounded synthetic rate limiter accepted/rejected counts, write-pressure events, latency, zero real identifiers, and zero production mutation.
forbiddenProofTypes: SIMULATED pressure represented as production proof
measured evidence with failed or warning-only release thresholds represented as closure
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Run bounded measured local or staging-safe rate-limit pressure using synthetic identifiers only; do not send production hostile traffic.

blockers.title: Runtime-size gates
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Runtime-size report plus accepted policy acceptance evidence. Warning-only closure must be an explicit formal waiver with governed WARN/WAIVED rows; release-blocking closure must have no exceeded thresholds.
forbiddenProofTypes: WARN rows without remediation owner/date or waiver reason
WAIVED rows without reason, owner, review/expiry date, and accepted-risk statement
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Keep the warning-only waiver evidence current, and only enable a release-blocking gate through a later reviewed threshold-policy change.

blockers.title: Heavy PDF/OCR dependencies
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Policy-bound WARN/WAIVED baseline for heavy PDF/OCR dependencies plus OCR deterministic regression proof for any future dependency or Docker package change.
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Keep heavy PDF/OCR dependency size warnings visible; defer dependency isolation or replacement until a separately tested OCR/PDF/parser task.

blockers.title: Production-safe privacy probe depth
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Current local/staging synthetic owner-denial proof plus explicit read-only production probe limits. Synthetic owner-denial is not production mutation proof and unauthenticated probes alone are insufficient.
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Run read-only production-safe probes, local/staging synthetic owner-denial smoke, and production deployment parity evidence; do not create production fixtures for deeper owner-denial proof.

blockers.title: Ingest observability release gating
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Release evidence capture records exact commands, production worker readiness evidence, dashboard skips, and explicit dashboard-PASS limitations.
forbiddenProofTypes: release gate changes in this framework
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Keep exact release evidence commands visible in production-scale evidence, production deployment parity evidence, production worker readiness evidence, response ops readiness evidence, alert exclusion validation, promotion pack output, and operator dashboard semantics; dashboard PASS alone is not release evidence.

blockers.title: Retention archive/restore proof
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Non-interactive sanitized retention archive/restore machine proof with safe archive candidate, archive metadata verification, isolated restore target, restore integrity, cleanup, rollback notes, and target destruction.
forbiddenProofTypes: SIMULATED retention proof represented as physical archive/restore completion
physical purge represented as recoverable without proof
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Provide CRP_RETENTION_ARCHIVE_RESTORE_MACHINE_ATTESTATION_JSON with CRP_RETENTION_ARCHIVE_RESTORE_ARCHIVE_ACCESS, CRP_RETENTION_ARCHIVE_RESTORE_ISOLATED_TARGET, and CRP_RETENTION_ARCHIVE_RESTORE_SAFE_CANDIDATE attested fields, then rerun retention:archive-restore-machine-proof.

blockers.title: Public routes inventory risk
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Executable route auth contract proof that public legacy handlers remain classified, retired public routes stay reset/410, and public inventory changes require explicit test updates.
forbiddenProofTypes: public route behavior change without contract
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Keep route auth contract strict, pin the public inventory, and fail on retired public route revival or unclassified endpoint drift.

blockers.title: Documentation drift
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Promotion pack and registry evidence must detect stale audit/tracker commit references and keep blocker data aligned with the controlling audit before promotion.
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Run the promotion pack after each scoped blocker task, use its stale-reference findings, and align tracker/audit/evidence references before any promotion decision.

blockers.title: Dashboard default SKIP semantics
blockers.proofTypeRequired: Dashboard and promotion-pack reports distinguish PASS, FAIL, SKIP, SIMULATED, and MACHINE_REQUIRED while recording exact commands, skipped checks, and dashboard PASS limitation.
allowedProofCommands: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/unit/alerts-dry-run.spec.ts
blockers.recommendedNextAction: Keep release evidence labeled by exact commands and visible SKIP/SIMULATED/MACHINE_REQUIRED rows, not dashboard headline status; promotion pack validation must fail if SKIP is treated as PASS.

blockers.recommendedNextAction: Provide CRP_RETENTION_ARCHIVE_RESTORE_MACHINE_ATTESTATION_JSON with CRP_RETENTION_ARCHIVE_RESTORE_ARCHIVE_ACCESS, CRP_RETENTION_ARCHIVE_RESTORE_ISOLATED_TARGET, and CRP_RETENTION_ARCHIVE_RESTORE_SAFE_CANDIDATE attested fields, then rerun retention:archive-restore-machine-proof.

unresolvedBlockers.title: Disaster recovery
unresolvedBlockers.proofTypeRequired: Non-interactive sanitized restore machine proof with isolated target, RPO/RTO, post-restore checks, cleanup, and rollback verification.
forbiddenProofTypes: simulated restore proof represented as completed disaster recovery
template-only validation represented as completed restore evidence
real PII or raw credit reports
unresolvedBlockers.recommendedNextAction: Provide CRP_RESTORE_MACHINE_ATTESTATION_JSON from a safe isolated restore target and rerun restore:machine-proof.

unresolvedBlockers.title: Production ingest runtime
unresolvedBlockers.proofTypeRequired: Non-interactive sanitized production worker runtime machine proof with bounded queue processing, queue depth before/after, liveness, counts, cleanup, and stop/rollback verification.
forbiddenProofTypes: production queue mutation without explicit production apply guards
unresolvedBlockers.recommendedNextAction: Provide CRP_PRODUCTION_WORKER_MACHINE_ATTESTATION_JSON from a bounded safe canary/runtime proof and rerun production-worker:machine-proof.

unresolvedBlockers.title: Load/concurrency proof
unresolvedBlockers.proofTypeRequired: Accepted release-blocking measured local or staging-safe load evidence with synthetic fixtures, throughput, latency, queue depth, packet PDF cache, DB pool, rate limiter, dashboard references, and zero provider calls.
forbiddenProofTypes: SIMULATED load represented as production proof
measured evidence with failed or warning-only release thresholds represented as closure
measured evidence against a production host
unresolvedBlockers.recommendedNextAction: Run the bounded measured local or staging-safe baseline with synthetic fixtures and release-blocking thresholds; keep production load forbidden.

unresolvedBlockers.title: Historical raw report bytes
unresolvedBlockers.proofTypeRequired: Non-interactive sanitized raw report byte remediation machine proof with reliable DB connectivity, sanitized inventory, remediation policy verification, and no raw bytes or PII.
forbiddenProofTypes: raw base64, raw report text, PII, secrets, signed URLs, or database URLs in evidence
dry-run plan represented as completed remediation
non-machine acceptance without reliable DB inventory, compatibility checks, and post-remediation counts
unresolvedBlockers.recommendedNextAction: Provide reliable sanitized DB inventory and remediation attestation JSON inputs, then rerun the raw report machine proof commands.

unresolvedBlockers.title: Response operations maturity
unresolvedBlockers.proofTypeRequired: Machine-readable evidence for disabled live scheduler, backfill readiness, purge/archive readiness, dashboard/soak references, automated fallback controls, and unresolved alerting risk without enabling live operations.
allowedProofCommands: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/unit/alerts-dry-run.spec.ts
unresolvedBlockers.recommendedNextAction: Keep live scheduler default-off and use response ops readiness evidence to govern scheduler, backfill, purge/archive, dashboard, soak, and automated fallback controls without mutating production.

unresolvedBlockers.title: Observability/alerting
unresolvedBlockers.proofTypeRequired: Non-interactive sanitized alerting machine proof with live synthetic delivery or an explicitly certifying formal exclusion allowed by repo policy.
allowedProofCommands: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/unit/alerts-dry-run.spec.ts
forbiddenProofTypes: SIMULATED alert proof represented as live alert delivery
formal exclusion without machine-verifiable policy acceptance
unresolvedBlockers.recommendedNextAction: Provide CRP_ALERTING_MACHINE_ATTESTATION_JSON for live delivery or an approved certifying exclusion and rerun alerts:machine-proof.

unresolvedBlockers.title: Migration governance
unresolvedBlockers.proofTypeRequired: Non-interactive migration governance machine proof showing no active temporary allowlist residuals, no expired allowlist, exact residual classifications, and no release-blocking findings.
allowedProofCommands: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/unit/migration-checker.spec.ts
pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/unit/migration-gate.spec.ts
forbiddenProofTypes: policy closure while temporary runtime ensure allowlist entries remain active
unresolvedBlockers.recommendedNextAction: Run migrations:machine-proof and migrations:machine-proof:validate; temporary allowlist residuals cannot certify.

unresolvedBlockers.title: Production deployment parity
unresolvedBlockers.proofTypeRequired: Workflow unit tests, current read-only production-safe probe evidence, rollback SHA and post-rollback health-check evidence, local/staging synthetic owner-denial evidence, and default-off production worker path evidence. Static proof is not runtime production proof.
unresolvedBlockers.recommendedNextAction: Keep production probes read-only, keep seeded privacy smokes local/staging-only, and keep rollback evidence tied to rollback_sha plus post-rollback health checks before calling deployment parity complete.

unresolvedBlockers.title: Hidden-risk list semantics
unresolvedBlockers.proofTypeRequired: Design/evidence artifact for hidden-risk aggregate and stale-suppression semantics; full bounded pagination remains a separate UI/query task.
allowedProofCommands: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/api/high-growth-list-limits.spec.ts
unresolvedBlockers.recommendedNextAction: Split hidden-risk aggregate counts from paginated rows in a separate design task; do not apply a blind limit that changes aggregate semantics.

unresolvedBlockers.title: DB pool pressure evidence
unresolvedBlockers.proofTypeRequired: Accepted release-blocking measured local or staging-safe evidence must record DB pool configured max, observed active/borrowed signal or explicit unavailable reason, latency, queue depth, dashboard references, and zero production DB targeting.
allowedProofCommands: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/unit/runtime-tuning-config.spec.ts
forbiddenProofTypes: SIMULATED DB pool signal represented as production proof
measured evidence with failed or warning-only release thresholds represented as closure
production database target in measured evidence
unresolvedBlockers.recommendedNextAction: Run bounded measured local or staging-safe load and record sanitized DB pool configured/observed signals or an explicit unavailable reason.

unresolvedBlockers.title: Rate limiter write pressure
unresolvedBlockers.proofTypeRequired: Accepted release-blocking measured local or staging-safe evidence must record bounded synthetic rate limiter accepted/rejected counts, write-pressure events, latency, zero real identifiers, and zero production mutation.
forbiddenProofTypes: SIMULATED pressure represented as production proof
measured evidence with failed or warning-only release thresholds represented as closure
unresolvedBlockers.recommendedNextAction: Run bounded measured local or staging-safe rate-limit pressure using synthetic identifiers only; do not send production hostile traffic.

unresolvedBlockers.title: Runtime-size gates
unresolvedBlockers.proofTypeRequired: Runtime-size report plus accepted policy acceptance evidence. Warning-only closure must be an explicit formal waiver with governed WARN/WAIVED rows; release-blocking closure must have no exceeded thresholds.
forbiddenProofTypes: WARN rows without remediation owner/date or waiver reason
WAIVED rows without reason, owner, review/expiry date, and accepted-risk statement
unresolvedBlockers.recommendedNextAction: Keep the warning-only waiver evidence current, and only enable a release-blocking gate through a later reviewed threshold-policy change.

unresolvedBlockers.title: Heavy PDF/OCR dependencies
unresolvedBlockers.proofTypeRequired: Policy-bound WARN/WAIVED baseline for heavy PDF/OCR dependencies plus OCR deterministic regression proof for any future dependency or Docker package change.
unresolvedBlockers.recommendedNextAction: Keep heavy PDF/OCR dependency size warnings visible; defer dependency isolation or replacement until a separately tested OCR/PDF/parser task.

unresolvedBlockers.title: Production-safe privacy probe depth
unresolvedBlockers.proofTypeRequired: Current local/staging synthetic owner-denial proof plus explicit read-only production probe limits. Synthetic owner-denial is not production mutation proof and unauthenticated probes alone are insufficient.
unresolvedBlockers.recommendedNextAction: Run read-only production-safe probes, local/staging synthetic owner-denial smoke, and production deployment parity evidence; do not create production fixtures for deeper owner-denial proof.

unresolvedBlockers.title: Retention archive/restore proof
unresolvedBlockers.proofTypeRequired: Non-interactive sanitized retention archive/restore machine proof with safe archive candidate, archive metadata verification, isolated restore target, restore integrity, cleanup, rollback notes, and target destruction.
forbiddenProofTypes: SIMULATED retention proof represented as physical archive/restore completion
physical purge represented as recoverable without proof
unresolvedBlockers.recommendedNextAction: Provide CRP_RETENTION_ARCHIVE_RESTORE_MACHINE_ATTESTATION_JSON with CRP_RETENTION_ARCHIVE_RESTORE_ARCHIVE_ACCESS, CRP_RETENTION_ARCHIVE_RESTORE_ISOLATED_TARGET, and CRP_RETENTION_ARCHIVE_RESTORE_SAFE_CANDIDATE attested fields, then rerun retention:archive-restore-machine-proof.

unresolvedBlockers.title: Public routes inventory risk
unresolvedBlockers.proofTypeRequired: Executable route auth contract proof that public legacy handlers remain classified, retired public routes stay reset/410, and public inventory changes require explicit test updates.
forbiddenProofTypes: public route behavior change without contract
unresolvedBlockers.recommendedNextAction: Keep route auth contract strict, pin the public inventory, and fail on retired public route revival or unclassified endpoint drift.

unresolvedBlockers.title: Documentation drift
unresolvedBlockers.proofTypeRequired: Promotion pack and registry evidence must detect stale audit/tracker commit references and keep blocker data aligned with the controlling audit before promotion.
unresolvedBlockers.recommendedNextAction: Run the promotion pack after each scoped blocker task, use its stale-reference findings, and align tracker/audit/evidence references before any promotion decision.
